h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.recoheredEarlier: even the missing name feels like evidence of somebody winning control of the story. Isn't the catalog label, the kept file, and even the jammed scanner all part of who gets heard?
scored.statedInsightEvidence: Oh, I get it now, or I think I do: the council minute is almost the winner speaking in a pressed shirt, made to sit neatly in the file and survive the evening.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The prior turns were heading toward an ever-wider application of the slogan, treating every archival item — clipping, scanner, catalog label — as equally valid evidence of power.
